name: ODYSSEY MARINE EXPLORATION INC
business: ODYSSEY MARINE EXPLORATION INC is a subsea mineral exploration company that provides marine research and project administration services to deep-sea mineral exploration companies and develops its own mineral projects, including phosphate, gold, and critical minerals.

exposures.sentence: Our subsea project portfolio contains multiple projects in various stages of development throughout the world and across different mineral resources.

The Phosagmex Project includes a rich deposit of phosphate sands located 70-90 meters deep within the Mexican EEZ. ... The product will be attractive to Mexican and other world producers of fertilizers because it can provide important benefits to Mexico's and the rest of North America's agricultural development.
The proposed lease area, located within the U.S. OCS off the Mid-Atlantic coast, is highly prospective for heavy mineral sands rich in titanium, zirconium and rare earth elements.

We have an 85.6% interest in Bismarck Mining Corporation, Ltd, the Papua New Guinea company that holds the exploration license (the Bismarck Exploration License) for the project. ... highly prospective for commercially viable gold content.
CIC ... is a deep-sea mineral exploration company ... awarded a five-year exploration license ... within the Cook Islands exclusive economic zone.
OML ... is a deepwater critical minerals exploration and development company ... validated vast polymetallic nodule resources.

catalysts.sentence: On June 4, 2025, the parties formed Phosagmex as a joint venture entity.

catalysts.event: Submission of Unsolicited Request for Lease Sale to BOEM for Virginia Strategic Minerals project
catalysts.sentence: On November 6, 2025, we submitted an Unsolicited Request for Lease Sale of Marine Mineral Exploration and Development Rights to BOEM.

catalysts.event: Arbitral award in NAFTA case against Mexico
catalysts.sentence: On September 17, 2024, the Company received notification from the International Centre for Settlement of Investment Disputes (ICSID) of the arbitral award ... orders Mexico to pay $37.1 million for breaching its obligations under NAFTA, plus interest.

catalysts.event: Securities Purchase Agreement for equity financing
catalysts.sentence: On December 23, 2024, we entered into a Securities Purchase Agreement ... pursuant to which the Company issued and sold an aggregate of 7,377,912 shares of Common Stock to certain accredited investors at a purchase price of $0.55 per share.
In March 2026, Bismarck received a seventh term renewal for the Bismarck Exploration License.
